narrative:
Gibsonburg A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 792 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.9 percentage points.
